name: ResourceRecord
description: Core data structure for all Ignition Gateway configuration resources (tag providers, user sources, OPC connections, databases, alarm profiles, etc.)

fields.name: signature
fields.description: Unique opaque identifier for this resource version; must be round-tripped on updates/deletes

fields.name: config
fields.description: Resource-type-specific settings; schema varies by collection

notes: The 'config' sub-object schema varies per collection. Use GET /data/api/v1/resources/type/{collection} to retrieve the JSON Schema for a specific resource type.
